tracks.meaning: a request or instruction to supply goods or perform a service, typically involving payment
an instruction to buy or sell securities or commodities at a specified price
to arrange, organize, or put into a sequence according to a system or hierarchy
a authoritative decree, edict, or command issued by a person or institution in power
a formal command or instruction given to troops or military personnel
a taxonomic rank in the classification system between class and family
a prescribed course of treatment or medication regimen given by a doctor
a state of peaceful, lawful, or well-organized arrangement without chaos
a systematic arrangement or sequence of items stored or catalogued
a request or demand for action or information
a request to a printer for the production of a specified quantity of printed material
a command to a person to cease disruptive behavior or leave a location
